events.description:
Official Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting.

Date & time: Sunday, March 15, 2026 — 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM (Eastern Time). Note: the email lists the time zone as EST; the meeting date is after U.S. DST begins (second Sunday in March), so local time will likely be EDT (UTC-4) on March 15, 2026 — see timezone note below.

Location (in-person): ACME Corp Headquarters, Executive Boardroom, 25th Floor, 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166

Video conference option: Zoom — Meeting ID: 987 654 3210; Passcode: Board2026

Tentative agenda:
- 10:00 AM - Call to Order
- 10:15 AM - CEO Report
- 11:00 AM - CFO Financial Review
- 12:00 PM - Working Lunch
- 1:00 PM - Strategic Initiatives
- 2:30 PM - Committee Reports
- 3:30 PM - New Business
- 4:00 PM - Adjournment

Additional notes:
- Board materials will be distributed one week prior to the meeting.
- Please confirm your attendance by March 1, 2026.

Timezone note: Email states "EST". Because March 15, 2026 falls after U.S. daylight saving time begins (March 8, 2026), the local eastern time is likely EDT (UTC-4). The start/end times above are provided using UTC-4 to match local clock time on the meeting date.
